company_description: Mistral AI builds and serves open-weight and commercial LLMs for enterprise inference.
Perplexity AI is an LLM-powered answer engine serving real-time search at scale.
Together AI provides fast open-source model inference APIs for developers.
Modal is a serverless GPU cloud for running ML workloads.
CoreWeave is a GPU cloud provider for AI and ML inference workloads.
Comet is an MLOps platform for experiment tracking model management and production monitoring.
Adept is building AI agents that take actions in software using multimodal LLMs.
Anyscale is the company behind Ray Framework for distributed ML workloads.
Neon is a serverless Postgres platform built for AI-native applications.
Qdrant is an open-source vector database for high-performance AI applications.
Dust is a platform for building custom AI assistants and agents for enterprise teams.
Vectara is an LLM-powered search and RAG platform for enterprise applications.
Replit is a cloud development environment with AI coding assistants at its core.
Sourcegraph is a code intelligence platform now powering Cody AI for developer productivity.
Labelbox is a training data platform and MLOps tool for computer vision and NLP.
Cohere for AI is a non-profit research lab focused on open-source multilingual LLMs.
DSPy is a framework for algorithmically optimizing LLM prompts and weights.
Cursor is an AI-first code editor using LLMs for code generation and assistance.
Codeium is an AI coding assistant with enterprise-grade self-hosted model serving.
Airtable is a no-code platform with growing AI automation and data features.
Miro is an online collaborative whiteboarding platform integrating LLM-powered features.
Intercom is a customer messaging platform now heavily investing in LLM-powered support agents.
Samsara is a fleet management platform using ML for routing driver safety and compliance.
Nansen is a blockchain analytics platform using ML to label wallet behavior at scale.
Cartesia builds real-time state space models for ultra-low latency audio AI applications.
